name: team stat with def unit and rate type, limit to player active
description: Test case for team stat with def unit and rate type, limit to player active
expected_query: with "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4" as (select "nfl_plays"."def", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec" as (select "nfl_plays"."def" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec_player_team_stats" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec" on "player_gamelogs"."tm" = "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."year" = "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec"."week" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", CAST(t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec_player_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4" on "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4"."def" = "player"."current_nfl_team" left join "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec_player_team_stats" on "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec_player_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t0a5c5917b6a2526c8ac18cb10a8f51ec_player_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
